title: stelis cesarensis
intro: Stelis cesarensis is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to Belize. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis cesarensis include treating various ailments, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infused in water, or made into a tincture for its medicinal properties to be utilized.
